_note: Bryan Johnson Blueprint supplement stack (public protocol, protocol.bryanjohnson.com). Values are daily targets.

supplements.name: Vitamin D3
supplements.rationale: Most adults are deficient; supports immune function, bone density, mood.

supplements.name: Omega-3 (EPA+DHA)
supplements.rationale: Reduces systemic inflammation, supports cardiovascular and brain health.

supplements.name: Magnesium Glycinate
supplements.rationale: Involved in 300+ enzymatic reactions; improves sleep quality and stress response.

supplements.name: Vitamin K2 (MK-7)
supplements.rationale: Directs calcium to bones rather than arteries; works synergistically with D3.

supplements.name: Vitamin B12 (Methyl)
supplements.rationale: Critical for neurological function; methylcobalamin form is best absorbed.

supplements.name: Zinc
supplements.rationale: Supports immune function, testosterone production, and wound healing.

supplements.name: Selenium
supplements.rationale: Antioxidant; thyroid function; may have anti-cancer properties.

supplements.name: Folate (5-MTHF)
supplements.rationale: DNA synthesis and repair; cardiovascular health.

supplements.name: Creatine Monohydrate
supplements.rationale: Most studied supplement for muscle strength, cognitive function, and cellular energy.

supplements.name: Lycopene
supplements.rationale: Antioxidant carotenoid; associated with reduced prostate cancer risk.

supplements.name: Calcium (if low diet)
supplements.rationale: Only supplement if dietary intake is insufficient — excess calcium can be harmful.
